default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows rising clicks (29%) and impressions; slight drop in CTR to be investigated](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [10 new articles published this week, 5 refreshes completed](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [New V2 workflow launching next week, promising vastly improved content quality](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [SEO testing reveals double increase in site metrics for GrowthX-produced articles](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Plans to implement bulk updates for Q4/Q1, including adding "2025" to titles for increased CTR](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Updates

  - [Articles indexed in Google Search Console showing solid rise in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Week-on-week growth observed, with slight drop in click-through rates (CTR) to be investigated](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [SEO testing reveals GrowthX articles outperforming site average: 29% increase overall vs. double increase for GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Devon requested a total view export of all GrowthX articles' performance](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [\~30 topics in consideration; Devon suggested adding more AI and CMS-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [10 new articles published this week](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [5 article refreshes completed and launched](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Devon to provide 5+ more articles for refresh next week, prioritizing based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Issue identified with Contentful updates not reflecting on live site; development fix needed](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### New V2 Workflow Launch

  - [Launching next week after final approval](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Improvements include:](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [Enhanced language quality, conciseness, and directness](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Improved fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Addition of valuable external links](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Incorporation of semantic SEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Better alignment with Webstacks' content style and voice](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Team anticipates significant content quality improvement](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### SEO Testing and Reporting

  - [Using SEO Test tool linked to Google Search Console for metrics](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [8-week monitoring period for each content batch](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Devon requested consolidated view of all GrowthX articles' performance](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)

### Bulk Content Updates for Q4/Q1

  - [Suggestion to update titles with "2025" across all articles to increase CTR](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Potential to use Airtable backend for bulk updates (authors, dates, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Team to prepare CSV file for bulk updates once endpoint is confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Clay and RB2B Integration

  - [Jimmy working on Clay and RB2B integration for ICP scoring](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)
  - [Initial scope: mapping ICP scores to blog URLs](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Jesse to add provided Webhook integration to RB2B for data flow](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch V2 workflow for content creation next week](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Investigate slight drop in click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Devon to provide next batch of articles for refresh](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Development team to fix Contentful update issue](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Create consolidated view of all GrowthX articles' performance in SEO Test tool](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Prepare for bulk content updates (adding "2025" to titles, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Jesse to implement Webhook integration for Clay and RB2B](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Jimmy to start mapping visitors (50-100/week) for ICP scoring once integration is complete](https://fathom.video/share/wg_DwSKyAdCRkKwAmgSZsLJFAS_WHGoj?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

action_items.description: Add more AI and CMS-related topics to content strategy
Refresh 5 more articles for next week, prioritizing based on performance data
Send Slack msg detailing requirements for SEO testing report (all articles, total view, most clicks/impressions)
Prepare CSV for bulk updates (2025 titles, authors) across all blog articles
Share AI content ideas with team (previously sent to Marsale)
Add provided webhook to RB2B for Clay integration, send test payload
